notes: Physician known for success in treating desperate diseases, nicknamed 'Jupiter' due to vanity; mentioned in context with King Agesilaus.

docs.title: Life of Agesilaus
docs.author: Plutarch
docs.excerpt: … of flattery called Jupiter; he was so vain as to take the name, and having occasion to write a letter to Agesilaus, thus addressed it: “Jupiter Menecrates to King Agesilaus, greeting.” The king returned answer: “Agesilaus to Menecrates, health and a sound mind.
